nasb.text: Even though princes sit and talk against me, Your servant meditates on Your statutes.

esv.text: Even though princes sit plotting against me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.

cnv.text: 雖有作領袖的坐著毀謗我， 你的僕人卻默想你的律例。

ccb.text: 虽然权贵们坐着毁谤我， 仆人仍要默想你的律例。

csbs.text: 即使首领们坐着说话反对我， 你的仆人也默想你的律例。
